sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الشَّبَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi svoje lične podatke kada koristimo mrežu.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information when using the network.

sentences.arabic: يَخْتَارُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُ الذَّكِيُّ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِحِسَابَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pametan korisnik bira jake lozinke za svoje račune.
sentences.translationEn: The smart user chooses strong passwords for his accounts.

sentences.arabic: الْأَمْنُ السَّيْبِرَانِيُّ يَحْمِي الْأَجْهِزَةَ مِنَ الْفَيْرُوسَاتِ وَالِاخْتِرَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Kibernetička sigurnost štiti uređaje od virusa i hakovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity protects devices from viruses and hacking.
